text:
Officer of Air Force Lagna Taurus 1 with Jup. 1;
Moon I] Ketu 9 Gemini; R. Saturn 10 Cancer; Mars 10 Virgo;

242 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
Sun 5, R. Mercury 8, Sagit.; Venus 5 Capricorn. Benetic lord
of gain is in the Lagna; Yogakaraka Saturn is in the 3rd, a watery
sign, (in own Ariisa) whose lord is full. Lord of Lagna is in
Fortune with the Ariisa of Happiness. The Yogakaraka and
Lagna-lord are in mutual Kendra and aspect. No doubt this
chart is not free from blemishes i.e. weaknesses. The profession
of this chart should be one relating to Saturn and Mars, the
former presiding over wind and the latter over weapons and
machines.
III. A Major in the Army Lagna Cancer 11; Sun B Leo;
R. Venus 11, Rahu 2, Merc. 4 Virgo; Mars 4 Scorpio; R. Saturn
I Capri.; R, Jup. 2 Aquarius; Moon 11 Taurus. Look at the
fine dispositions of planets in this chart. The Lagna-lord is
exalted in the 11th. There is Kesari Yoga. Mars, Mercury
and Saturn are in their own houses. The Moon is at the apex
